knowledge_base.title: Artificial intelligence
knowledge_base.snippet: Artificial intelligence (AI) is intelligence demonstrated by machines, as opposed to natural intelligence displayed by animals including humans.

knowledge_base.title: Machine learning
knowledge_base.snippet: Machine learning (ML) is a field of inquiry devoted to understanding and building methods that 'learn', that is, methods that leverage data to improve performance on some set of tasks.

knowledge_base.title: Deep learning
knowledge_base.snippet: Deep learning is part of a broader family of machine learning methods based on artificial neural networks with representation learning.

knowledge_base.title: Neural network
knowledge_base.snippet: A neural network is a network or circuit of biological neurons, or, in a modern sense, an artificial neural network, composed of artificial neurons or nodes.

knowledge_base.title: Reinforcement learning
knowledge_base.snippet: Reinforcement learning (RL) is an area of machine learning concerned with how intelligent agents ought to take actions in an environment in order to maximize the notion of cumulative reward.

knowledge_base.title: Autonomous agent
knowledge_base.snippet: An autonomous agent is an intelligent agent operating on an owner's behalf but without interference from that owner.

knowledge_base.title: Multi-objective optimization
knowledge_base.snippet: Multi-objective optimization or Pareto optimization is an area of multiple criteria decision making that is concerned with mathematical optimization problems involving more than one objective function to be optimized simultaneously.

knowledge_base.title: Natural language processing
knowledge_base.snippet: Natural language processing (NLP) is a subfield of linguistics, computer science, and artificial intelligence concerned with the interactions between computers and human language.

knowledge_base.title: Computer vision
knowledge_base.snippet: Computer vision is an interdisciplinary scientific field that deals with how computers can gain high-level understanding from digital images or videos.

knowledge_base.title: Expert system
knowledge_base.snippet: An expert system is a computer system that emulates the decision-making ability of a human expert.
